DIS.rationale: Beaten-down price (down 44% YoY, breaking 2020 lows) and some contrarian bullish signals are offset by sharply deteriorating earnings (Q4 FY22 EPS collapsed to $0.09 from $0.77 sequentially) and weak profitability metrics, leaving risk-adjusted reward roughly balanced.
key_factors: Stock down 43.9% over past year, breaking below 2020 COVID lows to $86.88
Q4 FY22 EPS collapsed to $0.09 from $0.77 in Q3 (88% sequential decline), driving P/E to 50.5x despite price drop
Weak profitability: ROE only 3.5%, net margin 4.2%, operating margin 14.7%
Mixed news sentiment: bearish headlines on 2022 losses dominate, but one source calls it "wildly undervalued" contrarian buy
P/B at 1.6x provides some valuation floor, but earnings trajectory remains the key risk

CRM.rationale: Despite a brutal 47.8% one-year drawdown, the downtrend remains intact with no fundamental inflection: ROE of 0.5%, net margin of 0.9%, and EPS still far below FY22's $1.48 run rate, while P/S of 4.4x is not cheap enough to compensate for deteriorating fundamentals.
key_factors: ret_1y=-47.8% with continued lower highs/lows into year-end (last close 132.59 vs 160.25 spike on 11/30)
ROE=0.5% and net_margin=0.9% indicate severely compressed profitability
Quarterly EPS trajectory weak: 0.21 (Q3) vs 0.07 (Q2) vs 0.03 (Q1), still well below FY22 full-year EPS of 1.48
Revenue growth decelerating: 7.41B → 7.72B → 7.84B with stock down 9.8% since last earnings
P/S=4.4x not compellingly cheap for a company with deteriorating fundamentals and PE=476.9x
